chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1694 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.7440/2019 3. For hearing of main case 06-03-2024 Mr. Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition as according to him, grievance of the petitioner has been redressed. Accordingly this petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
